review_reason: Phase 1 blocked: forward_F/backward_P for timelineQuotFMCS cannot be proven with current staged construction. The witness MCS from canonical_forward_F is NOT guaranteed to be in the staged timeline (see ClosureSaturation.lean lines 379-655 for detailed analysis).

artifacts.summary: Implementation plan v3 (Separated W/D Architecture) - Phase 1 marked BLOCKED

partial_progress.details: Phase 1 blocked on forward_F/backward_P proof for TimelineQuot FMCS. The staged construction adds F-witnesses based on formula encoding, but points added after a formula is processed may have that F-obligation without a witness in the timeline. This is a fundamental architectural gap: canonical_forward_F witnesses are Lindenbaum extensions that may not be CanonicalR-reachable from the root.

errors.message: forward_F for TimelineQuot FMCS requires witnesses to be in the staged timeline, but Lindenbaum witnesses from canonical_forward_F may not be CanonicalR-reachable from root
errors.recommendation: Consider alternative approaches: (1) Enriched staged construction that adds all witness MCSs, (2) Multi-family BFMCS with explicit witness families, (3) Direct semantic completeness proof without BFMCS temporal coherence, (4) Alternative domain that avoids the witness placement problem
